name: Sawang Resort & Golf Club
notes: 27-hole facility comprising three 9-hole courses: East, South, and North (North opened in 2017). Designed by Japanese architect Isao Katsumata. Located in Khao Yoi district, Phetchaburi Province — approximately 50 minutes north of Hua Hin and approximately 50 minutes south of Bangkok's outskirts; closer to Bangkok than to Hua Hin town. Address: 99 Moo 2, Sapang, Khao Yoi, Phetchaburi 76140. Email: info@sawangresortgolf.com. Golf cart use is mandatory (cart required). The East–South combination is considered the best 18-hole routing. Notable holes include a 535-yard par-5 dogleg and a 407-yard par-4 playing over water to an island green. Green fees from golfsavers.com: weekday THB 1,150 / weekend THB 1,800. golfcards.com lists base rate from THB 1,500. 1golf.eu lists THB 1,500 weekday / THB 1,800 weekend. Caddie and cart fees not confirmed separately — may be included or added on top of green fee; cart fee confirmed mandatory. Golf set rental THB 600, shoes THB 200. On-site hotel, restaurant, pool, spa. Marginally within typical 'Hua Hin area' golf groupings though technically in Phetchaburi Province. Distance and drive time reflect Bangkok, not Hua Hin. GPS from golfhuahin.com Sawang listing: 13.238968, 99.792370.
